findings.summary: LFB Modal image build failed 6 times — 3 sequential bugs (pip removal by mmseqs2 Python downgrade, missing git binary, ephemeral_disk below minimum). Should have probed image before deploying.
findings.evidence: 6 Modal app attempts, 3 fix commits (5535e03, 551bc4e, e0944c1)
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: modal shell / image.build() probe before first deploy of changed image. Added to Modal skill as gotchas #27-28.

findings.summary: ~40+ output file size checks polling Modal background tasks. Output is buffered — polling can't observe progress until function returns.
findings.evidence: Dozens of wc -c calls returning identical 960/1029 bytes
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: After 3 identical size checks on Modal background task, stop polling. Trust notification system. 3rd recurrence of file-poll pattern.

findings.summary: evaluate_tool early-returned No scores before checking embedded scores. Added REMM to benchmark but didn't test evaluate path.
findings.evidence: Line 756 early return blocked embedded score check. Fixed in 1a247c5.
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: When adding new benchmark tool, test evaluate_tool('new_tool') immediately after wiring.

findings.summary: 3 research subagents wrote only scaffolds despite incremental-write instructions. Required 3 recovery agents (~270K tokens).
findings.evidence: trait: 54 lines scaffold, PRS: 96 lines partial, penetrance: 0 lines
findings.proposed_fix: Architectural — subagents don't follow prompt instructions under search momentum. Recovery agents are the reliable backup. 6th+ recurrence.

findings.summary: Volume upload path confusion: modal volume put creates paths ON volume root, but runtime mount adds prefix. /data/results/ on volume becomes /data/data/results/ at runtime.
findings.evidence: 2 upload attempts, first to wrong path
findings.proposed_fix: Memory: Modal volume paths are relative to volume root. Upload results/foo.json not /data/results/foo.json.
